summary: Iteration 11 - Complete testing of modular document processing pipeline for staging and triple fusion generation. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend Triple-Tab UI verified working correctly with all components.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/staging/create-case - Creates case folder with case_id, 0 credits (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/staging/create-case - Requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: POST /api/staging/upload-files/{case_id} - Uploads PDF/DOCX files, 0 credits (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/staging/upload-files/{case_id} - Requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: GET /api/staging/case/{case_id} - Lists staged files with metadata (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/staging/case/{case_id} - Handles non-existent case gracefully
Backend: DELETE /api/staging/case/{case_id}/file/{filename} - Removes file from staging (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/staging/case/{case_id}/file/{filename} - Returns 404 for non-existent file
Backend: POST /api/staging/generate-triple-fusion/{case_id} - Generates all 3 documents with pipeline (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/staging/generate-triple-fusion/{case_id} - Returns 400 when no files staged
Backend: POST /api/staging/generate-triple-fusion/{case_id} - Requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: GET /api/staging/my-cases - Lists all staging cases for officer (200 OK)
Backend: CCTNS JSON structure validated with required fields
Frontend: Triple Fusion Generator page loads correctly
Frontend: Triple-Tab UI with Charge Sheet, Case Diary 1, Remand tabs present
Frontend: Tab switching works correctly between all 3 tabs
Frontend: File drop zone present with drag-and-drop support
Frontend: FIR Number input field works correctly
Frontend: Generate Triple Fusion button present
Frontend: Credits Used indicator shows 0 initially
critical_code_review_comments: Modular pipeline architecture correctly implemented with separate services: OCR, Classification, Extraction, Aggregation, Validation, Template Generation
Zero-credit staging system working - uploads are free, credits only deducted on successful generation
CCTNS JSON export includes all required fields: fir_number, police_station, district, sections, complainant_name, accused_count, witness_count
Pipeline stats returned correctly with files_classified and extraction_stats
Template-based DOCX generation using docxtpl with Jinja2 tags
AI usage strictly limited to Brief Facts and Remand Narrative generation only
Regex-based extraction working for person details, FIR numbers, sections, dates
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test cases via API: TEST-*/2026, UPLOAD-*/2026, FUSION-*/2026, CCTNS-*/2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: Modular document processing pipeline fully tested. Key endpoints: /api/staging/create-case (0 credits), /api/staging/upload-files/{case_id} (0 credits), /api/staging/case/{case_id} (list files), /api/staging/generate-triple-fusion/{case_id} (credits deducted). Pipeline services: OCRService, FileClassifier, ExtractionService, AggregatorService, ValidationService, TemplateService. Templates auto-generated in /app/backend/templates/ if not present. AI only used for Brief Facts and Remand Narrative generation.

pipeline_services_tested.file_classifier: Document type detection (FIR, Case Diary, Witness, Medical, etc.)
